rows.label: qev087305_MSG0001
rows.name: That's the Team Elma I know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087305_MSG0003
rows.name: Stable, but we have to hurry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087305_MSG0005
rows.name:
I've got Orton; Elma, you take
point and clear a path ahead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087305_MSG0006
rows.name:
Absolutely not. This is on
me. I'll take care of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087305_MSG0007
rows.name:
You take point and secure our
path. I'll take up the rear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087305_MSG0008
rows.name: All right. I'll take up the rear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087305_MSG0009
rows.name:
We must get him back safely. We owe
it to him, and the others we lost.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087305_MSG0010
rows.name:
All right, let's move out. We don't stop
until we hit the maintenance center.[ST:wait ]
